title: RapidMeta | Tezepelumab in Severe Asthma (audit-first, full-functionality)

pico.pop: Adults and adolescents with severe uncontrolled asthma on background ICS/LABA controller therapy
pico.int: Tezepelumab (anti-TSLP monoclonal antibody, 210 mg SC every 4 weeks)
pico.comp: Placebo or comparator on top of background controller
pico.out: Annualised asthma exacerbation rate (primary) and trial-declared primary endpoint per NCT
pico.subgroup: Eosinophil count, FeNO, prior biologic exposure, OCS dependence

real_data_entries.name: NAVIGATOR
real_data_entries.group: Severe uncontrolled asthma; tezepelumab 210 mg q4w vs placebo on background ICS/LABA; AAER primary
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: NAVIGATOR pivotal RCT (NCT03347279); AACT primary outcome = Annual Asthma Exacerbation Rate. Published HR/CI not parsed from cached abstract.

real_data_entries.name: SOURCE
real_data_entries.group: OCS-dependent severe asthma; tezepelumab 210 mg q4w vs placebo; reduction in OCS daily dose primary

allOutcomes.title: Categorised reduction from baseline in daily OCS dose (primary)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: SOURCE pivotal RCT (NCT03406078); AACT primary = categorised OCS-dose reduction; published MD -13.04 from V2 extractor.

real_data_entries.name: PATH-HOME
real_data_entries.group: Severe asthma; tezepelumab home-administration usability (PATH-HOME); proportions of successful administrations

allOutcomes.title: Proportion of HCPs/subjects successfully administering tezepelumab (primary)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: PATH-HOME RCT (NCT03968978); usability study of home administration.

extra_replaces: The Tezepelumab Evidence in Severe Asthma
